name: Save Excel Advanced
description: Powerful Excel Writer Node – Export DataFrames to .xlsx files with full control over sheets, ranges, dynamic naming, record splitting, formatting preservation, password protection, and advanced save modes. Ideal for business reporting, finance dashboards, compliance exports, and audit-ready files.

fields.name: path
fields.title: Path / File
fields.description: Full destination path including file name. Supports local, HDFS, S3, GCS, ADLS, etc. Example: /output/reports/sales_2024.xlsx or s3a://reports/final_output.xlsx

fields.name: saveMode
fields.title: Save Mode
fields.description:
How to handle existing files/sheets:
• OverwriteFile - replaces entire workbook
• OverwriteSheet - replaces only the target sheet (keeps other sheets)
• AppendSheet - adds rows below existing data
• ErrorIfExists - fails if file already exists
• Ignore - silently skips writing if file exists

fields.name: sheetName
fields.title: Sheet Name
fields.description: Name of the sheet to create or write to. Can be static (e.g., Summary) or dynamically generated via 'Sheet Name / File From Field'.

fields.name: range
fields.title: Range
fields.description:
Optional A1-style range or starting cell:
• C10 - starts writing at cell C10 (great for templates)
• B5:G50 - writes only inside this rectangle (truncates excess rows/cols)
Required when Preserve Formatting = true.

fields.name: takeNameFromField
fields.title: Sheet Name / File From Field
fields.description:
Column name to use for dynamic output:
• If value exists in a row - creates one sheet per unique value (e.g., Region - sheets North, South, etc.)
• If column has only one distinct value - can also be used to name the entire file dynamically

fields.name: includeHeader
fields.title: Include Header Row
fields.description: Write column names as the first row in Excel. Usually set to true for reporting.

fields.name: preserveFormatting
fields.title: Preserve Formatting
fields.description: Keep existing cell styles (fonts, colors, borders, number formats) when overwriting a range or sheet. Requires a defined Range and OverwriteSheet mode. Perfect for pre-formatted report templates.

fields.name: suppressIfNoRecords
fields.title: Suppress Output if No Records
fields.description: Do not create any file/sheet if the DataFrame is empty. Prevents empty placeholder files in production.

fields.name: maxRecordsPerSheet
fields.title: Max Records Per Sheet
fields.description: Maximum rows (excluding header) per sheet. If exceeded, automatically creates Sheet1_1, Sheet1_2, etc. Set to 0 for unlimited (default Excel limit ~1M rows).

fields.name: maxRecordsPerFile
fields.title: Max Records Per File
fields.description: Maximum total rows per output file. If exceeded, creates part files: report.xlsx, report_0001.xlsx, report_0002.xlsx, etc. Set to 0 for no splitting.

fields.name: password
fields.title: Password
fields.description: Optional password to protect the entire workbook or specific sheet. Users will need the password to open or modify the file.
